# Comparison Pod dataset checksums (SHA-256)
#
# These are the canonical hashes for the dataset bundles the pod fetches
# and validates before any benchmark run. The comparator (compare/compare.py)
# refuses to merge result records whose embedded dataset.hash differs from
# the matching entry here — same-data-or-no-comparison is the hardfact rule.
#
# Format: <sha256>  <relative-path-or-asset-name>
#
# Generated by datasets/fetch.py on first download.
# To regenerate by hand:
#   sha256sum datasets/bundled/synthetic_v1.json
#   sha256sum /path/to/longmemeval_s.json

d6f21ea9d60a0d56f34a05b609c79c88a451d2ae03597821ea3d5a9678c3a442  longmemeval_s.json
e9c0234087233b16d4a4d13a11f17afa621933982342d0b2dcff3587affb5e62  datasets/bundled/synthetic_v1.json
